recommendations.title: Central Station
recommendations.overview: An emotional journey of a former school teacher, who writes letters for illiterate people, and a young boy, whose mother has just died, as they search for the father he never knew.

recommendations.title: I'm Still Here
recommendations.overview: A woman married to a former politician during the 1971 military dictatorship in Brazil is forced to reinvent herself and chart a new course for her family after a violent and arbitrary act.

recommendations.title: Behind the Sun
recommendations.overview: Brazilian badlands, April 1910. Tonho is ordered by his father to avenge the death of his older brother. The young man knows that if he commits this crime, his life will be divided in two: the twenty years he has already lived and the few days he has

recommendations.title: Dark Water
recommendations.overview: Dahlia and her five-year-old daughter are ready to begin a new life together. But their new apartment — dilapidated and worn — suddenly seems to take on a life of its own. Mysterious noises, persistent leaks of dark water and other strange happenings

recommendations.title: On the Road
recommendations.overview: Sal Paradise is a young writer whose life is shaken and ultimately redefined by the arrival of Dean Moriarty, a free-spirited, fearless, fast talking Westerner and his girl, Marylou. Traveling cross-country, Sal and Dean venture out on a personal que

recommendations.title: Luca
recommendations.overview: Luca and his best friend Alberto experience an unforgettable summer on the Italian Riviera. But all the fun is threatened by a deeply-held secret: they are sea monsters from another world just below the water’s surface.

recommendations.title: Ciao Alberto
recommendations.overview: With his best friend Luca away at school, Alberto is enjoying his new life in Portorosso working alongside Massimo—the imposing, tattooed, one-armed fisherman of few words—who's quite possibly the coolest human in the entire world as far as Alberto i

recommendations.title: Summer of 85
recommendations.overview: What do you dream of when you're 16-years-old and in a seaside resort in Normandy in the 1980s? A best friend? A lifelong teen pact? Scooting off on adventures on a boat or a motorbike? Living life at breakneck speed? No. You dream of death. Because

recommendations.title: Paris Je T'aime
recommendations.overview: Olivier Assayas, Gus Van Sant, Wes Craven and Alfonso Cuaron are among the 20 distinguished directors who contribute to this collection of 18 stories, each exploring a different aspect of Parisian life. The colourful characters in this drama include
recommendations.director: Gurinder Chadha, Daniela Thomas, Joel Coen, Frédéric Auburtin, Gérard Depardieu, Nobuhiro Suwa, Richard LaGravenese, Bruno Podalydès, Vincenzo Natali, Walter Salles, Ethan Coen, Alfonso Cuarón, Alexander Payne, Tom Tykwer, Isabel Coixet, Oliver Schmitz, Christopher Doyle, Olivier Assayas, Sylvain Chomet, Gus Van Sant, Wes Craven

recommendations.title: Train Dreams
recommendations.overview: A logger leads a life of quiet grace as he experiences love and loss during an era of monumental change in early 20th-century America.
